closed_world.value: Survivors stranded on a mysterious island after cruise ship hits rocks and suffers hull damage
closed_world.quote: stranded on some island in the middle of the Atlantic, that evidently no one has ever heard of

investigator.value: Jonathan, retired Navy Master Chief Petty Officer and Marine who becomes reluctant leader of survivors
investigator.quote: he was a retired Master chief Petty Officer, for Christ' sake

red_herring.value: The island appearing 'deserted' when it contains hidden inhabitants with dig spots and dart weapons
red_herring.quote: This "deserted" island, was not as deserted as they believed.

clue_fairness.value: Reader sees the dig spots and dart attack simultaneously with Jonathan's discovery
clue_fairness.quote: He stumbled uopn a few dig spots. He knelt down to get a closer look at them.

social_world.value: Military hierarchy with Jonathan (Navy/Marines) asserting command over other service members and civilians
social_world.quote: And how about your entire lifetime, I spent in the Navy AND Marines. Is that good enough?

media_and_audience.value: Island folklore from military sources describing it as demonic and dangerous
media_and_audience.quote: Full of demons, and if anyone ever found themselves deserted on it, they should go ahead and expect the absolute worse

investigator_wound.value: Jonathan's traumatic military connection to this specific island from 1985 commanding officer's warnings
investigator_wound.quote: He thought about the last time he had seen this island. His commanding officer, in the spring of 1985
